items.summary: Update the Job Role Prediction frontend section to display the explanation for each of the top 3 predicted roles. For each role, show the list of detected skills and the matching factors beneath or alongside the existing confidence bar/chart visualization.

Enhance the backend ATS score computation to include NLP preprocessing steps — stopword removal and lemmatization — on the resume text before performing TF-IDF cosine similarity comparison against the job description for the selected role. The preprocessed text should be used for all downstream scoring.

Enhance the Job Role Prediction backend logic to return, alongside the top 3 predicted roles and confidence percentages, an explanation for each prediction. The explanation must list the skills detected in the resume and the matching factors (keywords/skills) that contributed to that role's confidence score.
